name: Dan Hennessey, Statewide Field Director
subject: FWD: Can You Spare a Few Hours?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for Indiana
body:
---
| Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw Marty’s email about volunteering for Super Saturday this weekend with Team Pence.

We appreciate any time you could spare helping make calls or knocking doors to show your support for the Governor.

Thank you,

Dan Hennessey
Statewide Field Director

On Sun, Jun 19, 2016 at 11:00 AM, Marty Obst <[communications@mikepence.com](http://links.mikepence.com/u/e8fc06976d534dfc8dd2166579050314?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_header_email&utm_term=campaign-super-saturday&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160621-fwd-can-you-spare-a-few-hours-3611-survey-mc)> sent: |
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/f6a7813f1150473580478b113aa96548?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=campaign-super-saturday&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160621-fwd-can-you-spare-a-few-hours-3611-survey-mc) |
| Friend, **On Saturday, June 25th,** we'll be contacting Hoosiers across the state to spread our message and build support for the Governor. We need your help on this important day — [**would you knock on doors or make calls for just a few hours?**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/179eba541ea245f0b4bd924f6ea64757?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=campaign-super-saturday&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160621-fwd-can-you-spare-a-few-hours-3611-survey-mc)

We've invested in a system that allows our volunteers to **make calls from anywhere in the world** — so you can even call from the comfort of your home! Our door-to-door app couldn't be easier to use and our field staff will be happy to train you on it from a field office in your area.

**If you can help for any amount of time on Super Saturday, [please click here to sign up,](http://links.mikepence.com/u/affd3c13c54348c48ac390d941568d4c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_2&utm_term=campaign-super-saturday&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160621-fwd-can-you-spare-a-few-hours-3611-survey-mc) or just reply to this email! **

Thank you,
Marty Obst |

subject: breaking MT records
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

I know we've sent you a whole bunch of emails recently. I wish it wasn't necessary. But as it's been reported, this is expected to be the most expensive governor's race in Montana's history. [**Will you pitch in $15 to help make sure we have the resources to compete?**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=b49FZa37T5OyNbJsalQ3Un2p1FfPggOs)

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=h8RAcUkS8OCZsgFjoiV%2FHH2p1FfPggOs)
---

I don't think elections should be decided by who can write the biggest check -- and I know Montanans don't either. But Greg Gianforte continues to put in hundreds of thousands of dollars of his own money, so I'm depending on you to make sure we don't get drowned out.

Tonight at midnight is the first fundraising deadline of the general election. **We 're now $2,943 short of what we need to stay on track. There hasn't been a more important time to contribute -- [please donate $15 today.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=eM%2B8rNTzHsjm3VyRBg6D%2BX2p1FfPggOs)**

Thanks,
Steve

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Here’s where we are - and this is me asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I need to tell you something | Friend --

I have some slightly concerning news -- our fundraising is still behind where we thought it would be for June.

So right now, we're waiting to make some really important decisions (like when to bring on new staff, where to open which office, even how much advertising we should reserve for the fall) until we get some indication that we're going to land in a good place before June 30th.

It's worth pausing for a second to acknowledge that Trump hasn't shown himself to be particularly good at fundraising. But as he likes to point out, he could loan his campaign millions and millions of dollars any moment he wants. In fact, as of yesterday morning, he's pledged to match every dollar that a grassroots donor contributes for the next two days. And even without spending a bunch of money, he still manages to keep himself on television basically twenty-four hours a day.

Which makes me even more anxious about the fact that we're off course.

Every single time we've leveled with you over the course of this campaign, you've stepped up. Every time we gave you the facts and told you why we needed you, you've helped us to correct course.

So that's where we are, and this is me asking...

**Can you chip in right now to help us raise the money we need in June? Make your first donation today, and we’ll send you a free sticker:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU3OTk3MjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMjk3NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Joe Biden
subject: Need this one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hey friend,
I served in the United States Senate for nearly 40 years, and let me tell you -- I know what it takes to make progress there. You need the ability to forge consensus, the willingness to work together, and most of all, a real passion for expanding opportunity for hard-working families. Maggie Hassan has all that and more, and that's why the country needs her representing New Hampshire in the Senate today.
You can help send her there. She's in a tough election with special interests pouring in millions of dollars to make sure she doesn't win. She needs your help and I'm hoping you'll support and donate to Maggie's campaign today. subject: Kick it up a notch
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
My campaign is about going where the people are. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4329/1c469400/6e4f931/356a2c3/1960488606/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- My campaign is about going where the people are. That's why I've been to all of Wisconsin's 72 counties more than once, and why I've put over 46,000 miles on the campaign van. Since getting into the race, I've spent as much time as possible on the road, listening to my fellow Wisconsinites. And each conversation energizes and inspires me. My desire to serve the people of Wisconsin has never been stronger. And if I'm fortunate enough to win this election, I'll do the hard work it takes to get things done, because Wisconsinites from Ashland to Kenosha have told me that's what our state needs. And I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work! But our current senator, Ron Johnson, doesn't think it's his job to listen to the people he represents -- and it shows. That's why in his last campaign ad, Senator Johnson couldn't point to even one thing he's accomplished in the Senate! We have the momentum. But, to win, we need to turn up the pressure even more. Our campaign's June 30 end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just around the corner. This is our biggest chance to show Senator Johnson and the 10 right-wing groups currently backing his campaign just how strong our grassroots team is. Right now, we're at $125,000, but with your help, we can double that number. So I'm setting the most ambitious grassroots goal of our campaign yet: $250,000. **[Will you donate $5 today to help us reach our $250,000 goal by midnight on June 30?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4329/1c469400/6e4f931/356a2c3/1960488606/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4329/1c469400/6e4f931/356a2c3/1960488606/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4329/1c469400/6e4f931/356a2c3/1960488606/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4329/1c469400/6e4f931/356a2c0/1960488606/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-22_eoq1_nd&utm_campaign=eoq1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Over and over, you hear political pundits say that Wisconsin is hopelessly divided and that we all resent each other. But that's not what I'm hearing from Wisconsinites. The truth is, most people I meet are ready to unite. They're ready to put an end to the slash-and-burn politics that have dominated Wisconsin for the last six years. And they're ready to elect a senator that will work for them, not the special interests.
Thank you, always, for your continued support.
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold

name: Friends of Cole
subject: ICYMI... Bill Cole shares his vision for Governor to business leaders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

In case you missed it, Bill Cole spoke with Huntington business leaders yesterday about his vision for West Virginia and the race for Governor. Please take the time to read the entire story on his vision and campaign to be the next Governor of West Virginia.

#
Cole talks jobs with Huntington Chamber directors
_HUNTINGTON - Any political candidate will say he or she supports creating jobs, but the bigger question is whether there's a plan to accomplish that, Republican gubernatorial nominee Bill Cole said Tuesday in Huntington._ _"Jobs is and will always be the top priority, but it starts with leadership, and our state needs a governor that has a real plan," Cole said._ _Cole met with the Huntington Regional Chamber of Commerce's board of directors Tuesday afternoon at the St. Mary's Conference Center. He faces Democratic nominee Jim Justice in the November general election._ _Cole said not only did West Virginia create a horrible business climate under eight decades of a Democrat-controlled Legislature, but it is now the only state where a majority of the adult working-age population does not have a job._ _"West Virginia's job participation rate is 48 percent," he said. "This is worst in the country. We have too many people depending on the system and not enough paying into the system."_ _Cole said the state is not only overregulated by the federal government, but it also overregulates itself._ _"West Virginia has 230 boards and commissions," he said. "The average for a state is about 90. These are political paybacks and just another case of overregulating the businesses that are already in our state. We talk about bringing in business, but we are not even taking care of the businesses we already have."_ [Click here to read the entire article](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.herald-dispatch.com%2Fnews%2Fcole-talks-jobs-with-huntington-chamber-directors%2Farticle_551b35ad-b235-5a02-8082-1503f2ff1c1b.html&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=herald_dispatch&n=1)
Bill Cole knows that West Virginians are demanding change that includes a new vision to strengthen our economy and create new, high paying jobs. West Virginia is at a tipping point, the effect of the 2016 elections will influence the direction of our state for a generation.

Please join the campaign by [putting up a yard sign, showcasing a bumper sticker or volunteering!](http://www.billcolewv.com/volunteer?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=herald_dispatch&n=2)

Thank you for your support,
Friends of Cole

name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: 'Sit in' with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, the horrific attack on the LGBT community in Orlando last week shocked and outraged us all. But this week we saw something nearly as shocking. The refusal of the GOP to act on commonsense gun safety measures that would help put an end to the epidemic of gun related violence in our communities.

Last week Senate Democrats held a 15-hour filibuster to force Senate Republicans to call a vote on legislation that would make our country a safer place. Then on Monday Senate Republicans blocked all four gun reform measures. But that's not the end of this fight.

Right now my Democratic colleagues and I are leading a sit-in on the House floor to demand a House vote to curb gun violence once and for all. We cannot give up on this. We have to increase the pressure on Republicans until they are forced to represent the interests of the American people, not the gun lobby.

Please 'sit in' with us today by adding your name:[**http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-house-democrats-you-re-sitting-in-with-them-**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ddd/70cdc2ba/47f372e2/397214e/3034590799/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-house-democrats-you-re-sitting-in-with-them-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-++httpactionvanhollenorgpagestellhousedem&utm_campaign=em0622162&source=em0622162")

Chris

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:

Friend,

I'll be honest -- when I set a $15,000 grassroots fundraising goal, I thought it was going to be a stretch. [**We 're now just $1,857 away. Donate $15 now.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jjfPmhvnZKv4Z5pQS5x3HqlRpGIIfPqe)

As Steve writes below, this is expected to be by far the most expensive Montana governor's race ever. If elections were just about merit and past accomplishments, we could all sit back and rest easy -- record investments in public schools, Montana ranked as the most fiscally prudent state in the country, health care coverage now extended to tens of thousands of Montanans, unemployment down, wages up and a budget surplus. But we know there's going to be big money behind an onslaught of negative ads trying to distract from all Steve has gotten done.

We must have the resources to push back. **We 're just six hours away from the first deadline of the general election. Thanks,
Eric

We’re just one week out from our first quarterly FEC fundraising deadline since Donald Trump became the GOP nominee, so there’s never been a better time to step up and tell the world that you’re proud to be a part of this team. **That’s why, for 48 hours only, we’re offering these limited-edition personalized supporter cards -- will you chip in now to claim yours?** | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4MDg3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzNDQ2OTQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: occupying the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

I want to first introduce myself. I'm the former Executive Director of the Maryland Democratic Party -- and now Chris's Campaign Manager.

It's been a very busy week for us here at Van Hollen HQ, but I wanted to take a moment to reach out about what's going on right now on the floor of the House.

I know Chris emailed you earlier. I just wanted to underscore that this is a critical moment in the fight to get Republicans to listen to everyday Americans about the need to take steps to address gun violence.

Chris spoke eloquently on the House floor earlier today. Ending gun violence has always been a top priority of his and today he and his Democratic colleagues are saying they have had enough of Republican obstructionism. As they literally have a 'sit-in' on the House floor to protest, they're displaying the very best of our values.

**[Please show Chris and his Democratic partners in the House that you're with them and sitting by them. Sign now to show your solidarity and thanks!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ddb/70cdc2ba/47f3f7b9/397211c/1484587341/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-house-democrats-you-re-sitting-in-with-them-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+show+Chris+and+his+Democratic+par&utm_campaign=em062216_2&source=em062216_2")**

Hey friend,
I served in the United States Senate for nearly 40 years, and let me tell you -- I know what it takes to make progress there. You need the ability to forge consensus, the willingness to work together, and most of all, a real passion for expanding opportunity for hard-working families. Maggie Hassan has all that and more, and that's why the country needs her representing New Hampshire in the Senate today.
You can help send her there. She's in a tough election with special interests pouring in millions of dollars to make sure she doesn't win. She needs your help and I'm hoping you'll support and donate to Maggie's campaign today. [**Give $3 or what you can to elect a real champion for our families.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd41e/2a380d31/13568901/fbe854/710590470/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjIyX2JpZGVua2lja2VyX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160622_bidenkicker_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
I've known Maggie since she was a State Senator -- I've watched her make college more affordable for Granite Staters, stand up for marriage equality, and fight for women's health care rights. Now, with the future of the Supreme Court on the line and Washington Republicans pushing to roll back all of the progress we've made for the country over the last eight years, we need her leadership more than ever.
But we need you to make your first gift to help elect Maggie and take back the Senate.**[Please, donate now so we can win this election, and elect a real fighter for the middle-class.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd41e/2a380d31/13568901/fbe854/710590470/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjIyX2JpZGVua2lja2VyX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160622_bidenkicker_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

Joe Biden
